zh.lifeSummary: 當John Howchyns於1505年1月11日出生在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文德索時，他的父親John Howchyns19歲，母親Baston23歲。他於1529年與Joane Wright在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文德索結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年1月11日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特布洛阿德文德索。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Howchyns于1505年1月11日出生在英国多瑟特布洛阿德文德索时，他的父亲John Howchyns19岁，母亲Baston23岁。他于1529年与Joane Wright在英国多瑟特布洛阿德文德索结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年1月11日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特布洛阿德文德索。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Howchyns was born on 11 January 1505, in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England, his father, John Howchyns, was 19 and his mother, Baston, was 23. He married Joane Wright in 1529, in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 January 1569, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Howchyns est né le 11 janvier 1505, à Broadwindsor, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Howchyns, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Baston, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joane Wright en 1529, à Broadwindsor, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Broadwindsor, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Howchyns am 11. Januar 1505 in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Howchyns 19 und seine Mutter Baston 23. Er hat 1529 in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England Joane Wright geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1569 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Broadwindsor, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Howchyns è nato il il 11 gennaio 1505 nel Broadwindsor, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Howchyns, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Baston, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joane Wright nel 1529, nel Broadwindsor, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 gennaio 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Broadwindsor, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Howchynsが1505年1月11日にイギリスドールセトブロアドウィンドソルで生まれた時，父John Howchynsは19歳，母Bastonは23歳であった。1529年にイギリスドールセトブロアドウィンドソルでJoane Wrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1569年1月11日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトブロアドウィンドソルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Howchyns(이)가 1505년 1월 11일 영국 도르세트 브로드윈드소르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Howchyns(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Baston(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 도르세트 브로드윈드소르에서 Joane Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 1월 11일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 브로드윈드소르에 묻혔다.

pt.Broadwinsor Liberty, Dorset, England, Un: Broadwinsor Liberty, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Howchyns nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1505, em Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Howchyns, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Baston, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Wright em 1529, em Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1569, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Howchyns родился 11 января 1505 г. в местности броадвиндзор, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Howchyns было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Baston, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Wright в 1529 г. в местности броадвиндзор, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 января 1569 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности броадвиндзор, дорсет, Англия.

Murió el 11 de enero de 1569, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Broadwindsor, Dorset, Inglaterra.
